film.title: Jodi Breakers
film.overview: Jodi Breakers is a Hindi film directed by Ashwini Chaudhary featurring R Madhavan and Bipasha Basu in the leading roles with Omi Vaidya and Dipannita Sharma in supporting roles.

dialogues.dialogue: And work is done immediately after meeting. So tell me how I should say thanks to you. Shall we finish the work which was left incomplete......before the old man arrived? - Hey, have little shame. Your husband died just now. Yes. Didn't I wear white colored night dress?
You bloody rascals. You are making a bloody business out of this. Shameful. I know I deserve more than this, but I am... I am really sorry, granny. Sorry? How will sorry help?
Then where's the bar's menu? Fakar! I am proud of all my devotees. You took out time from your busy lives and came here. You idiot.
